prompt:
You are a PROOF-FILLER. Replace the `sorry` placeholders for the listed declarations with complete, type-correct Lean proofs. Do NOT change statement signatures; do NOT weaken hypotheses.

Lean files live under: /<repo-root>/CausalSmith/CausalSmith/Substrate/FanoInequality
Target declarations: CausalSmith.Substrate.FanoInequality.negMulLog_add_mul_log_le, CausalSmith.Substrate.FanoInequality.entropy_le_crossEntropy, CausalSmith.Substrate.FanoInequality.yMarginal_sum, CausalSmith.Substrate.FanoInequality.yMarginal_nonneg, CausalSmith.Substrate.FanoInequality.le_yMarginal, CausalSmith.Substrate.FanoInequality.errorProb_nonneg, CausalSmith.Substrate.FanoInequality.errorProb_le_one, CausalSmith.Substrate.FanoInequality.correctMass_eq

## Instructions
Fill in the `sorry`s in the Lean 4 (Mathlib) file `/<repo-root>/CausalSmith/CausalSmith/Substrate/FanoInequality/Basic.lean`. Edit ONLY the proofs (replace each `sorry`); do NOT change any statement, signature, definition, import, or docstring. Do NOT edit any other file. No new `sorry`, no `axiom`, no `native_decide`, no `admit`. After editing, the file must build with `cd /<repo-root>/CausalSmith && lake build CausalSmith.Substrate.FanoInequality.Basic` showing only `sorry`/linter warnings — and zero after your fills.

Context: `entropy` is `Causalean.Mathlib.InformationTheory.entropy p = ∑ i, Real.negMulLog (p i)` (open `Causalean.Mathlib.InformationTheory`). The proof `entropy_le_log_card` already in that core file (`/<repo-root>/Causalean/Mathlib/InformationTheory/Entropy.lean`) is the template for the two hard lemmas here — READ it first.

Proof guidance (each is elementary):

1. `negMulLog_add_mul_log_le` (goal `Real.negMulLog x + x * Real.log g ≤ g - x` from `0≤x`, `0≤g`, `x≠0→0<g`): `rcases eq_or_lt_of_le hx with rfl | hxpos`. Case `x=0`: `simp [Real.negMulLog]` then the goal is `0 ≤ g` (use `hg`). Case `0<x`: get `0<g` from `hac hxpos.ne'`. Use `Real.log_le_sub_one_of_pos` on `g/x` (positive): `Real.log (g/x) ≤ g/x − 1`. Show `Real.negMulLog x + x*Real.log g = x * Real.log (g/x)` via `Real.negMulLog_def` and `Real.log_div hg.ne' hxpos.ne'` (so `log(g/x)=log g − log x`) then `ring`. Multiply the log bound by `x≥0` (`mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left`), and `x*(g/x − 1) = g − x` via `field_simp`. Mirror `negMulLog_sub_mul_log_le` in the core.

2. `entropy_le_crossEntropy` (goal `entropy p ≤ −∑ i, p i * Real.log (g i)`): per-term `negMulLog_add_mul_log_le (hp0 i) (hg0 i) (hac i)`, sum via `Finset.sum_le_sum`. LHS sum `∑ (negMulLog (p i) + p i * log (g i)) = entropy p + ∑ p i * log (g i)` (use `entropy_def`, `Finset.sum_add_distrib`). RHS `∑ (g i − p i) = ∑ g − ∑ p ≤ 1 − 1 = 0` (`Finset.sum_sub_distrib`, `hgsum`, `hpsum`). Conclude with `linarith`. Mirror `entropy_le_log_card`.

3. `yMarginal_sum`: `simp only [yMarginal]`; then `∑ y, ∑ x, p (x,y) = ∑ xy, p xy`. Use `← Fintype.sum_prod_type'` (which states `∑ z:α×β, f z = ∑ b, ∑ a, f (a,b)`), then `exact hsum`.

4. `yMarginal_nonneg`: `Finset.sum_nonneg (fun x _ => hp0 _)`.

5. `le_yMarginal` (goal `p (x,y) ≤ ∑ x', p (x',y)`): `Finset.single_le_sum (f := fun x' => p (x',y))` with nonneg `(fun i _ => hp0 _)` and `Finset.mem_univ x`. Unfold `yMarginal` first.

6. `errorProb_nonneg`: `simp only [errorProb]; refine Finset.sum_nonneg ?_; intro xy _; split_ifs` → `le_refl`/`hp0`.

7. `errorProb_le_one`: `errorProb = ∑ (if .. then 0 else p) ≤ ∑ p = 1`. `rw [errorProb_def, ← hsum]`; `Finset.sum_le_sum`; per term `split_ifs`: `hp0` (0 ≤ p) or `le_refl`.

8. `correctMass_eq` (goal `∑ (if c then p else 0) = 1 − errorProb`): note for each `xy`, `(if c then p xy else 0) = p xy − (if c then 0 else p xy)` (`split_ifs <;> ring`). Then `Finset.sum_sub_distrib`, `hsum`, and `errorProb_def` give `∑ p − errorProb = 1 − errorProb`. (`c` is `xy.1 = decode xy.2`.)

Verify lemma names with the lean LSP tools before using; check the goal state after each tactic. When done, run the build to confirm no warnings except the pre-existing unused-section-variable linter notes.

Use the lean-lsp MCP tools to check your proof (diagnostics/goal). When done, output a SHORT plain-text report: which decls you closed, which remain, and any blocker. No JSON required.
rawOutput:

Remaining: none. No `sorry`, `axiom`, `admit`, or `native_decide` remain in the file.
